data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of QR code scanning via phone camera or dedicated scanner. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. Specifically, the linked use case mentions the need for QR code scanning, but there is no evidence of QR code generation or scanning capabilities, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of QR code scanning functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add QR code scanning validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system can successfully scan and validate QR codes.
